states.name: Trissle
states.title: Trissle
states.description: Trissles are very common all over Erden. They're even popular pets in many cities, although this ends up making them something of a pest problem because they're very wild in adulthood and are often abandoned. So trissles are often found raiding urban garbage and demolishing gardens.

states.name: Treasle
states.title: Treasle
states.description: One of the most important children's stories in Erden, the Treasle and the Troubadour, put Treasles forever in the cultural eye. In the story, a troubadour lost her hand in war, and couldn't play the lute. After falling to depression, a whimsical Treasle showed her other ways she could tell her stories to the world.
